title: pappophorum commune
intro: Pappophorum commune, also known as Pappophorum, is a plant species in the family Poaceae, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pappophorum commune include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Pappophorum commune can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use.
